mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY obsb.reg_dt DESC) AS rowNum, obsb.JOB_NM AS jobNm, obsb.JOB_GROUP AS jobGroup, obsb.JOB_DESC AS jobDesc, ISNULL(obsb.PARAM_SBST, '') AS paramSbst, obsb.PERD_SBST AS perdSbst, obsb.USE_YN AS useYn, CASE obsb.USE_YN WHEN 'Y' THEN N'사용' WHEN 'N' THEN N'미사용' ELSE '' END AS useYnNm, obsb.REGR_ID AS regrId, obsb.REGR_ID AS regrNm, obsb.REG_DT AS regDt FROM om_batch_sclg_bas obsb
ORDER BY obsb.reg_dt DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT obsb.JOB_NM AS jobNm, obsb.JOB_GROUP AS jobGroup, obsb.JOB_DESC AS jobDesc, obsb.PARAM_SBST AS paramSbst, obsb.PERD_SBST AS perdSbst, obsb.USE_YN AS useYn, obsb.REGR_ID AS regrId, obsb.REG_DT AS regDt FROM om_batch_sclg_bas obsb WHERE obsb.JOB_NM = #{jobNm} AND obsb.JOB_GROUP = #{jobGroup}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_batch_sclg_bas (JOB_NM, JOB_GROUP, JOB_DESC, PARAM_SBST, PERD_SBST, USE_YN, REGR_ID, REG_DT, REG_PGM) VALUES (TRIM(#{jobNm}), TRIM(#{jobGroup}), TRIM(#{jobDesc}), TRIM(#{paramSbst}), TRIM(#{perdSbst}), TRIM(#{useYn}), 'system', GETDATE(), 'BatchSclgService')
mapper.update: UPDATE om_batch_sclg_bas SET JOB_GROUP = TRIM(#{data.jobGroup}), JOB_DESC = TRIM(#{data.jobDesc}), PARAM_SBST = TRIM(#{data.paramSbst}), PERD_SBST = TRIM(#{data.perdSbst}), USE_YN = TRIM(#{data.useYn}), AMDR_ID = 'system', AMD_DT = GETDATE(), AMD_PGM = 'BatchSclgService' WHERE JOB_NM = TRIM(#{jobNm}) AND JOB_GROUP = TRIM(#{jobGroup})
